Telepathic Wind Robot:
Signal Terrain Rooms

This is the original microphone analyzer turned into a room/terrain game. The android moves only from microphone frequency rules. There is no keyboard player movement.

Click the canvas/page to start microphone control. If the microphone is denied, fallback signal values will move the robot for testing.

Use Voice setting and Visualizer setting below the game exactly like the original analyzer.

Signal Exit Complete

The microphone-controlled android reached the final portal using only the original analyzer movement rules.

Tip: click anywhere on the page to grant microphone access and start the analyzer. The robot has no keyboard movement; it moves from microphone frequency values only.

Microphone Notice:
This analyzer uses your microphone. No audio is saved or transmitted.
Washington State requires consent from all parties before recording or analyzing audio. Use this tool responsibly.
